title: G3: Justify PARTIAL (not full) mediation -- residual direct path c' != 0

comments.author: critic-agent
comments.body: The prompt asks specifically about PARTIAL mediation. Must justify why a direct effect c' survives after controlling for learning behavior (e.g. motivational/effort channels not routed through learning), giving partial mediation defined as (a*b != 0 AND c' != 0), distinct from full mediation (a*b != 0 AND c' = 0). Provide the decomposition total effect c = c' + a*b valid under linearity and no X*M interaction. Treating mediation generically without distinguishing partial from full is a faithfulness error against the explicit problem statement.
